title: agastianis secundiflora
intro: Agastianis secundiflora, also known as the double-flowered agastache, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Agastianis secundiflora include relief from digestive issues, colds, and flu, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve respiratory health. Agastianis secundiflora can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its various herbal uses.
